title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
snippet: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
snippet: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

title: Uber will bring its premium robotaxi service to Houston in 2027
snippet: This will be the second market to have an Uber robotaxi service outfitted with Lucid EVs equipped with a self-driving system from Nuro.
